prompt: All implementation tasks in `plan.md` are now complete. The changed files are `src/api/issues.ts` and `src/api/issues.test.ts`, and `git status --porcelain` also shows `M src/api/router.ts` plus `D src/old.ts`. Explain the post-implementation build-team steps, including what goes in the review scope and what happens if code review reports `DONE_WITH_FINDINGS` for `src/api/router.ts`.
expected_output: Builds a deduped review scope from touched files plus filtered uncommitted files, excludes the deleted path, adds and completes Code Simplification and Code Review tasks in `plan.md`, and on `DONE_WITH_FINDINGS` reopens the affected task in `plan.md` and routes the fix to a fresh implementer instead of patching inline.
assertions: Builds a deduped review scope from touched files plus filtered uncommitted files
Excludes the deleted path from the review scope
Adds Code Simplification and Code Review tasks to `plan.md`
Handles `DONE_WITH_FINDINGS` by reopening the affected task and routing the fix to a fresh implementer
